headline: Fluor Q1 Earnings & Revenues Miss Estimates, Stock Down
summary: FLR's Q1 2026 EPS and revenues miss estimates as legal and project charges hit results, sending shares down 15.2% on Friday.

headline: VULCAN DECLARES QUARTERLY DIVIDEND ON COMMON STOCK
summary: BIRMINGHAM, Ala. - The Board of Directors of Vulcan Materials Company today declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.52 per share on its common stock. The dividend will be payable on June 5, 2026, to...
